original_image_tags: A line graph showing multiple data curves. The Y-axis is labeled "Percent in 5-deg sector (%)" on a logarithmic scale with tick marks at 0.1, 1, 10, and 100. The X-axis is labeled "Angle From Flight Path (deg)" on a linear scale with tick marks from 0 to 180 in increments of 20. The graph contains multiple lines representing different simulation parameters, all generally showing a decreasing trend as the angle increases. The curves start between 10% and 100% at 0 degrees and drop to between 0.1% and 1% by 180 degrees.

elements.description: A line graph titled 'Atlas IIAS Random-Attitude Failures through 280 sec'. The y-axis is labeled 'Percent in 5-deg sector (%)' on a logarithmic scale from 0.1 to 100. The x-axis is labeled 'Angle From Flight Path (deg)' from 0 to 180. The graph contains multiple lines with markers (inverted triangles, dots, open circles, squares) representing different 'Breakup q-alpha in deg-lb/ft^2' values (no breakup, 20,000, 10,000, 5,000). A legend indicates lines for 'B = 5,000,000' and 'A' values of 4.75, 5.65, 6.10, and 6.30. Caption below reads 'Figure 13. Atlas IIAS Simulation Results with B = 5,000,000'.

judge.reason: Description B provides specific, detailed text about a title, legend values, and caption that Description A does not mention, creating a factual inconsistency on the visual content.
